canonical_metric_authority.note: Compatibility authority is the frozen IMC vector, not CLI demo variant outputs.

packet_compatibility_guarantees: Bio consumes IMC compatibility artifacts statically and does not import IMC runtime code.
Wave-1 golden packet fixture tests enforce deterministic trimodal packet extraction.
Strict packet version validation is available for decode ingress and raises explicit unsupported-version errors for smell/touch version drift.
Python/Rust parity is required in CI rust-quality matrix and validated by tests/test_parity.py.
known_divergences: Bio introduces biosignal-centric CLI surfaces (ECG/EEG/multimodal-stream/chemosense-bio) not present in IMC package CLI.
Bio multimodal demos are not treated as IMC canonical metric authority; IMC vector total_words=844 remains authoritative for cross-family compatibility.
Bio phase gates include biomedical codec/repro falsification lanes that are out-of-scope for IMC release pipeline.

breaking_change_policy.bio_side_rule: Any change to marker semantics, packet version interpretation, or dispatch assumptions requires updating this vector and rerunning Wave-1 compatibility fixtures.
required_actions_for_breaking_change: coordinate downstream replay against IMC frozen vector and report divergences
